title: Polish Toasted Delight
description: A simple, crispy snack inspired by Polish cuisine. Crunchy bread toasted to perfection, topped with sweet ingredients.
instructions: Cut the bread into 1-inch slices and place on a baking sheet.
Bake the bread slices in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes or until crispy.
If using, cook the crispy bacon in a pan until crispy and set aside.
Spread a layer of sweet Polish mustard on each toasted bread slice.
Drizzle a layer of honey over the mustard.
Sprinkle crushed toast on top of the honey.
